modelFamily: Causal robust changepoint detector with explicit duration
changeScore: max positive robust-z innovation across growthDeterioration and financialStress

entryPolicy.rule: enter when changeScore >= 2.5 and financialStress >= 0.45, or financialStress >= 0.65

durationPolicy.maximumDurationOverride: remain active beyond 18 months only when financialStress >= 0.70

probabilityPolicy: Deterministic logistic transform of the larger of normalized changeScore and financialStress level; parameters fixed by this config.
testInference: causal forward filter only; no backward smoothing or future-dependent segmentation
labelUse: NBER and stress labels are read only after predictions are frozen; robust scaling uses train features only.
outerOosPolicy: Forbidden for selection or parameter changes; optional diagnostic only after implementation and config hashes are frozen.
selectionPolicy: No threshold, duration or scale rule may change after inner validation. Any change requires a new model id.
limitations: Monthly sampling can delay within-month changes.
A changepoint is not equivalent to a recession and must be evaluated on both recession and stress tasks.
